name: Context Shelf
description: Build a polished macOS menu-bar shelf for parking the current tab, clipboard snippet, and scratch note before switching tasks, then make resuming fast and calm.
short_description: Park the front tab, clipboard snippet, and scratch note in a compact resume shelf.
audience: Mac users who get interrupted and need to resume fast
Researchers and operators juggling browser tabs, notes, and chat
Builders who want a calm parking spot for in-flight context
detail_lines: Parks the front tab, clipboard text, and a short scratch note into one compact resume bundle.
Keeps the next thing to reopen visible in the menu bar so task switches stop turning into scavenger hunts.
Stays deliberately small with shelf, pin, resume, and clear actions instead of a sprawling workspace manager.
